title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 546.250 - Person injured may testify
text:
546.250.  Person injured may testify. — No person shall be rendered incompetent to testify in criminal causes by reason of his being the person injured or defrauded, or intended to be injured or defrauded, or that would be entitled to satisfaction for the injury, or is liable to pay the costs of the prosecution.
(RSMo 1939 § 4078) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3689; 1919 § 4033; 1909 § 5239 
Civil practice as to witnesses in civil and criminal trials, 491.070
